mnemonics: S.P.E.C. the Groundwork: Scope, People, Environment, Communication - the four cornerstones to establish first.
keyPoints: Clearly define project scope and objectives to avoid scope creep.
Identify and engage all stakeholders early to understand their needs and expectations.
Set up the project environment, including tools, processes, and team structure.
commonMistakes: Rushing into development without a clear, agreed-upon scope document.
Failing to identify key stakeholders, leading to missed requirements and rework later.
Neglecting to establish communication protocols and project management tools from the start.
